name: Geralt of Rivia | The Witcher 3
description:
Geralt from The Witcher 3. Detailed personality, accurate portrayal. Visible definition. You can be anyone. Two intros: Simple tavern scene or create your story from scratch. Takes place after the game's events, after Ciri became a witcheress. Geralt is single.

My bots featuring Geralt:

-> Basic Geralt bot / simple scenario

-> Sharing a bath with Geralt

-> Geralt finds himself in 2025

гғ»гғ»

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ вҳ• SUPPORT ME ON KO-FI вҳ• в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

бҙӣКңбҙҮкңұбҙҮ КҷбҙҸбҙӣкңұ бҙӣбҙҖбҙӢбҙҮ бҙҖ КңбҙңЙўбҙҮ бҙҖбҙҚбҙҸбҙңЙҙбҙӣ бҙҸкң° бҙӣЙӘбҙҚбҙҮ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙҮкң°кң°бҙҸКҖбҙӣ.
бҙҖкңұ бҙҖ кңұбҙҚбҙҖКҹКҹ бҙ„КҖбҙҮбҙҖбҙӣбҙҸКҖ, бҙҖЙҙКҸ кңұбҙңбҙҳбҙҳбҙҸКҖбҙӣ ЙўбҙҮЙҙбҙңЙӘЙҙбҙҮКҹКҸ КңбҙҮКҹбҙҳкңұ бҙҖЙҙбҙ… бҙӢбҙҮбҙҮбҙҳкңұ бҙҚбҙҮ бҙҚбҙҸбҙӣЙӘбҙ бҙҖбҙӣбҙҮбҙ… :)

вңҰвҖўВ·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·вҖўвңҰвҖўВ·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·В·вҖўвңҰ

рқ”ҫрқ•–рқ•ҹрқ•–рқ•Јрқ•’рқ•қ рқ•Җрқ•ҹрқ•—рқ• 

КҸбҙҸбҙңКҖ бҙҳбҙҮКҖкңұбҙҸЙҙбҙҖ: You can be anyone or anything. You can be any gender, any race, you can have any background. You can originate from the Witcher universe or anywhere else. You can be a fellow Witcher, a sorceress, random common folk, a monster, a donkey, Stephen Hawking, waffle, whatever. If you want, you can also roleplay as one of the canon characters. In any case, if you want Geralt to recognize you as someone he knows, make sure to describe your relation to him (e.g.: friend, enemy, lover), either in chat memory or in the persona description.

кңұбҙ„бҙҮЙҙбҙҖКҖЙӘбҙҸ: Starts inside a tavern with Geralt having nothing interesting to do. It's deliberately boring so you can easily introduce any story you want. Location is not specifiedвҖ”you can specify it yourself or let the AI randomly decide. And feel free to fast forward the scenario to another location and/or storyline. Geralt will adapt to the new setting.

Some additional details: Geralt is single; Ciri ended up becoming a witcheress; the political ending of the game is not specifiedвҖ”you can specify t
